el: Reference Images
en: Reference Images
zh: 参考图

el: You can upload up to 4 reference images.
en: You can upload up to 4 reference images.
zh: 最多可上传 4 张参考图。

el: Reference Video
en: Reference Video
zh: 参考视频

el: Reference/editable video for Omni video editing
en: Reference/editable video for Omni video editing
zh: Omni 视频编辑的参考/待编辑视频

el: Optional MP4/MOV (≤200MB) to edit or reference an existing video. Requires at least one reference image.
en: Optional MP4/MOV (≤200MB) to edit or reference an existing video. Requires at least one reference image.
zh: 可选的 MP4/MOV（≤200MB），用于编辑或参考已有视频。需至少一张参考图片。

el: Help text for the reference video uploader
en: Help text for the reference video uploader
zh: 参考视频上传的帮助文字

el: Upload Video
en: Upload Video
zh: 上传视频

el: Button to upload the reference video
en: Button to upload the reference video
zh: 上传参考视频的按钮

el: You can upload a maximum of 1 reference video
en: You can upload a maximum of 1 reference video
zh: 最多只能上传 1 个参考视频

el: Error when more than one reference video is uploaded
en: Error when more than one reference video is uploaded
zh: 超过 1 个参考视频时的错误提示

el: Reference video upload failed, please try again later
en: Reference video upload failed, please try again later
zh: 参考视频上传失败，请稍后重试

el: Error when the reference video upload fails
en: Error when the reference video upload fails
zh: 参考视频上传失败时的错误提示

el: Uploaded file must be in MP4 or MOV format!
en: Uploaded file must be in MP4 or MOV format!
zh: 上传的文件必须是 MP4 或 MOV 格式！

el: Error when the reference video is not MP4/MOV
en: Error when the reference video is not MP4/MOV
zh: 参考视频格式不是 MP4/MOV 时的错误提示

el: Uploaded file size cannot exceed 200MB!
en: Uploaded file size cannot exceed 200MB!
zh: 上传的文件大小不能超过 200MB！

el: Error when the reference video exceeds 200MB
en: Error when the reference video exceeds 200MB
zh: 参考视频超过 200MB 时的错误提示

el: Please enter a prompt.
en: Please enter a prompt.
zh: 请输入提示词。

el: Validation when prompt is empty
en: Validation when prompt is empty
zh: 提示词为空时的校验提示

el: Please add at least one reference image when using a reference video.
en: Please add at least one reference image when using a reference video.
zh: 使用参考视频时，请至少添加一张参考图片。

el: Validation when video_urls has no reference image
en: Validation when video_urls has no reference image
zh: 提供 video_urls 但缺少参考图片时的校验提示
